# Release Notes - v1.1.0-dev.20260211

**Environment:** dev
**Release Date:** 2026-02-11
**Build:** 31
**Commit:** d4924095e061bfe9ee6a96cee6d2a68b29f63563

## Features

- ✨ Add tenant service for multi-tenancy context resolution and implement change control creation with just-in-time user provisioning. (f0aad6a6)
- ✨ Introduce SQL script for tenant data merge, a change control command handler, and a tenant service. (43b83bde)
- ✨ Introduce pre-release testing infrastructure with a detailed report, testing hook, and frontend components for versioning and release notes. (ac2b5d28)
